metadata.title: Application for Order and Supporting Declaration (Family Law — Custody and Support)
metadata.author: Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
metadata.copyright: © 2024–2026 Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann. All Rights Reserved.

fields.guidance_en: Enter the case number from the existing family law case.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese el número de caso del caso de derecho familiar existente.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入现有家庭法案件的案件编号。

fields.guidance_en: Check ALL orders you are requesting. Be specific. Each checked box should be supported by facts in the declaration section below.
fields.guidance_es: Marque TODAS las órdenes que solicita. Sea específico. Cada casilla marcada debe estar respaldada por hechos en la sección de declaración.
fields.guidance_zh: 勾选您请求的所有命令。每个勾选的框应在下方声明部分有事实支持。
common_errors: Checking custody but not specifying legal vs physical
Not supporting each request with facts

fields.guidance_en: Specify requested custody arrangement: sole or joint legal custody, sole or joint physical custody, and for which children. Include specific timeshare schedule if requesting physical custody.
fields.guidance_es: Especifique el arreglo de custodia solicitado: custodia legal exclusiva o compartida, custodia física exclusiva o compartida.
fields.guidance_zh: 说明请求的监护安排：单独或共同法律监护，单独或共同物理监护。
common_errors: Not distinguishing legal from physical custody

fields.guidance_en: State facts supporting your requests under penalty of perjury. Include: dates, specific incidents, children's needs, current arrangements, and why the requested orders serve the children's best interest (FAM §3011).
fields.guidance_es: Declare los hechos que respaldan sus solicitudes bajo pena de perjurio. Incluya: fechas, incidentes específicos, necesidades de los niños.
fields.guidance_zh: 在伪证处罚下陈述支持您请求的事实。包括：日期、具体事件、儿童需求。
